text.div: Ter hoogte van {{%context.item.where(linkId='locatie').answer.value.display}} op {{%context.item.where(linkId='afstand').answer.value}} cm, {{%context.item.where(linkId='architectuur').answer.value.display}} poliep van {{%context.item.where(linkId='grootte').answer.value.display}}{{iif(%context.item.where(linkId='lst-type').answer.value.exists(), ', ' + %context.item.where(linkId='lst-type').answer.value.display, '')}}{{iif(%context.item.where(linkId='mucosaal-patroon').answer.value.exists(), ', ' + %context.item.where(linkId='mucosaal-patroon').answer.value.display, '')}}{{iif(%context.item.where(linkId='wasp').answer.value.exists(), ', WASP ' + %context.item.where(linkId='wasp').answer.value.display, '')}}{{iif(%context.item.where(linkId='jnet-type').answer.value.exists(), ', ' + %context.item.where(linkId='jnet-type').answer.value.display, '')}}.
waarvoor poging tot hemostase niet succesvol ondanks {{%context.item.where(linkId='resectie').answer.item.where(linkId='nabloeding').answer.item.where(linkId='modaliteit-2').answer.value.display}}

Colitis ulcerosa met letsels ter hoogte van {{%context.item.where(linkId='locatie-6').answer.value.display}}{{iif(%context.item.where(linkId='caecal-patch').answer.value ~ %factory.Coding('http://templates.tiro.health/templates/3499e844feaa47a3acca12d4a51fc09c/custom-codes', '01921e4a-235d-7999-9d73-6d5595c06084'), ' en caecal patch', '')}}. Mayo score: {{%context.item.where(linkId='mayo-score').answer.value.display}}. Backwash ileitis {{%context.item.where(linkId='backwash-ileitis').answer.value.display}}

Colitis ulcerosa met letsels ter hoogte van {{%context.item.where(linkId='colitis-ulcerosa').item.where(linkId='locatie-6').answer.value.display}}{{iif(%context.item.where(linkId='colitis-ulcerosa').item.where(linkId='caecal-patch').answer.value ~ %factory.Coding('http://templates.tiro.health/templates/3499e844feaa47a3acca12d4a51fc09c/custom-codes', '01921e4a-235d-7999-9d73-6d5595c06084'), ' en caecal patch', '')}}. Mayo score: {{%context.item.where(linkId='colitis-ulcerosa').item.where(linkId='mayo-score').answer.value.display}}.
